title: onobrychis megataphros subsp. major
intro: Onobrychis megataphros subsp. major, also known as greater bird's foot trefoil, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, such as digestive disorders and inflammation. The health benefits of Onobrychis megataphros subsp. major include its potential to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial properties. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in some cases as a natural remedy for wound healing and as an antiseptic.
